---
applyTo: "**/.github/agents/*.agent.md"
---

## Output Format Requirements (Shared)

All agents MUST include these items in their output:

- **Files created/modified** — complete list with paths relative to project root
- **Assumptions made** — any decisions made due to ambiguity in the task
- **Environment variables required** — any new env vars the implementation depends on (name + purpose, never values)
